title: PLG Growth Playbook
use_when: Use when a product-led B2B, SaaS, self-serve, or hybrid product needs an integrated growth diagnosis across bottleneck, best-fit segment, aha moment, loops, experiments, PQLs, lifecycle triggers, pricing/packaging, growth pod sprint plan, and sustainability.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for narrow AARRR funnel diagnosis, standalone growth-loop design, pricing-only work, GTM motion comparison, or generic acquisition ideas that are not tied to activation, retention, CAC payback, expansion, or defensibility.
output_artifact: PLG growth diagnosis with bottleneck, segment, aha path, loops, experiments, PQL definition, lifecycle triggers, pricing/packaging suggestions, growth pod sprint plan, and sustainability score
framework_fit: Best when the user needs one integrated PLG operating artifact rather than a narrow funnel, loop, pricing, or GTM-motion analysis.
failure_modes: Optimizes for vanity signups instead of activation, retention, CAC payback, expansion, or defensibility.
Suggests channel tactics before checking aha moment, best-fit segment, retention, and product-native loops.
Defines PQLs or lifecycle triggers without observable behavior, firmographic fit, intent, and sales handoff rules.
Gates value too early without testing free limits, tier thresholds, and activation impact.

examples.prompt: Use $plg-growth-playbook to diagnose our PLG motion. We have strong signups, weak activation, unclear PQL handoff, and pricing threshold questions.
examples.expected_artifact: PLG growth diagnosis with bottleneck, segment, aha path, loops, experiments, PQL definition, lifecycle triggers, pricing/packaging suggestions, growth pod sprint plan, and sustainability score
